name: Very Good Security
description: Payment tokenization and credential management platform with PCI-compliant vault and network tokens.

seo.title: Very Good Security — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Very Good Security: Payment tokenization and credential management platform with PCI-compliant vault and network tokens.

when_to_use: PCI-compliant card tokenization without handling raw PANs
Network token provisioning for Visa and Mastercard payments
Credential vault for multi-PSP card data sharing

pros: Handles card data plus broader sensitive data
Network tokens and credential management built in
Reduces PCI scope without heavy re-architecture
cons: Pricing can grow fast at high volume
UI feels older than newer competitors
Some overlap with Basis Theory and Evervault
review.verdict: Veteran choice for vaulting and network tokens; pick newer DX-first options if you prize modern developer experience.
review.best_for: Mid-market and enterprise merchants needing a proven PCI vault plus network-token program.
review.not_for: Teams that want a full orchestrator, or dev-first shops who prefer newer API design.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
